Package neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Class MitigationSuggestion

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.envelope.MitigationSuggestion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<MitigationSuggestion>
public final class MitigationSuggestion extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<MitigationSuggestion>
Advisory operating action suggested from a narrow or violated margin.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • MitigationSuggestion

      public MitigationSuggestion(String marginKey, String description, String targetEquipment, String targetVariable, double suggestedValue, String unit, MitigationSuggestion.Priority priority, MitigationSuggestion.Category category, String expectedImprovement, double confidence)
      Creates a mitigation suggestion.
      Parameters:
      marginKey - margin key that triggered the suggestion
      description - suggested action description
      targetEquipment - target equipment name
      targetVariable - target variable or constraint name
      suggestedValue - suggested value, or Double.NaN when qualitative
      unit - engineering unit
      priority - priority level
      category - action category
      expectedImprovement - expected improvement text
      confidence - confidence from 0.0 to 1.0

  • Method Details

    • fromMargin

      public static MitigationSuggestion fromMargin(OperationalMargin margin)
      Builds a generic suggestion for a narrow margin.
      Parameters:
      margin - margin that triggered the suggestion
      Returns:
      mitigation suggestion

    • priorityFromStatus

      private static MitigationSuggestion.Priority priorityFromStatus(OperationalMargin.Status status)
      Converts a margin status to action priority.
      Parameters:
      status - margin status
      Returns:
      action priority

    • chooseCategory

      private static MitigationSuggestion.Category chooseCategory(OperationalMargin margin)
      Chooses a suggestion category from the margin metadata.
      Parameters:
      margin - operational margin
      Returns:
      suggestion category

    • suggestedValue

      private static double suggestedValue(OperationalMargin margin)
      Calculates a conservative suggested value.
      Parameters:
      margin - operational margin
      Returns:
      suggested value, or Double.NaN when no finite limit exists
